BundleInfo.name: CryoModel
BundleInfo.Author: Matthew L. Baker
BundleInfo.Synopsis: CryoModel: domain identification and COM analysis
BundleInfo.Description: Domain identification and center-of-mass analysis for macromolecular structures, including automatic domain segmentation and COM distance / angle statistics.

Classifiers.ChimeraXClassifier: ChimeraX :: Tool :: CryoModel Domain Tool :: Structural Analysis :: Domain identification and COM analysis
